title: ToggleToggle
description: Adds a keybind for switching between the "toggle" and "hold" options for sprinting and sneaking."
body:
# ToggleToggle

Simple Fabric mod that adds a keybind for switching between the \"toggle\" and \"hold\" options for sprinting and sneaking.

![Text reading "Sneak: Toggle"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5062146383233a46a618f438eb1c219a7cb9b1a.png)
